ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Complaint Filed In Case Number 287035
Off Calendar Jun-11-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 287035. Daniel Conrad appearing for Franklin Niemi. James Hand appearing for defendants Meadowlark and Louis Ogle. Mr. Conrad reported the the property has been sold and they have settled with VHL. Trial will take more than two half days. The Complaint filed on 6/29/06 is referred to the Presiding Judge to set for trial. Order signed. This status is off calendar.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Arias.

Petition For Auth. To Pay Litigation Counsel Fees
Off Calendar May-08-2007 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearingon Exparte Petition To Approve Settlement
Off Calendar Mar-26-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 287035. Daniel Conrad and Peter Laurie appearing as litigation counsel for Franklin Niemi. Terry Mollica appearing for Value Home Loans. James Hand appearing for Meadowlark, LLC. Doug Penson appearing for Franklin Niemi as conservator. Court is approving the settlement agreement in the trust case. Order signed. Claim against Meadowlark is still pending. The complaint was filed in the conservatorship and status on the complaint is set on 6/11 in both cases.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Dave Davenport CSR# 1694. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Loos.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1400 Oakdale Ave. S.F.)
Off Calendar Mar-20-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Douglas Penson (Counsel for Franklin Neimi, Trustee).

After Mr. Penson announced the sale and sale terms and after receiving an overbid in excess of the required amount, the Court confirmed the sale of the property at the overbid price of $560,070.00. Additional bond was set at $145,000. The Order for same was signed in open court but subsequent to the hearing.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: Deputy Rigo Guitron; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jan-16-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Petn. For Auth. To List And Sell Real Property
Off Calendar Aug-01-2006 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets And To Correct Case Name
Off Calendar Aug-01-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearence by Douglas A. Penson, atty for petitioner
Conservatee is to be place in a rehab facility for six months. Once completed this if he is OK he will possobly be placed in a residential facility. If not, he will have to return to a another rehab. facility. Petition concerning asset is resolved. Assets consist of real property only. The matter about the case name is also resolved. The matter involving th sell of real property is taken under submission.
Judge:John Dearman, Clerk:Larrisa Dotson, Rptr:Christina Paxton, Baliff:Mizota
